subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst write was presented unto the Most Holy Court, and the response is as follows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مطالبیکه مرقوم فرموده بودند بساحت اقدس عرض شد جواب اینست که ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
